name: Nutty Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Put butter, corn syrup, cocoa and raisins in a medium-size saucepan.
2. Stir over gentle heat until the butter melts and the mixture is well blended.
3. Remove from heat. Stir cornflakes and about 3/4 of the hazelnuts into the melted mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture into miniature paper baking cups placed on a baking sheet.
5. Sprinkle remaining hazelnuts over each cookie.
6. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until set.
7. Arrange Nutty Bites attractively on a serving dish.
8. If desired, use chopped candied cherries and toasted almonds instead of hazelnuts and raisins.
9. Store in an airtight container in a cool place for 2 to 3 days.
Makes 30 to 40 cookies.
